---

> **Lifecycle**: Candidate -> Done (delete this file) | Dropped (delete + add reason to commit message)
>
> **Naming**: `docs/backlog/<short-slug>.md` — lowercase, hyphens, descriptive slug.
>
> **Cleanup**: When done, delete the file. The commit message and/or ADR are the permanent record.
